text:
is a Shinkalion appearing in the Plarail Shinkalion CW toyline based on the Shinkalion: Change the World series.

Profile

The combination is composed of the Shinkalion 500 TYPE EVA as the core of the combination, with the ERDA Positron Rifle separating to form additional parts. The vehicle's main body forms a new set of legs, the front cannon becomes a handheld weapon, part of the counterweight becomes armor for the pelvis, and the black mechanical rig at the back of the vehicle becomes a scope assembly for the right shoulder, with the 500 TYPE EVA's shoulderpad now being swept back. Finishing off the combination is the 500 TYPE EVA's original leg parts mounting behind the thighs, while a shield is now attached to the left forearm.

Weapons

Positron Rifle
Based on combat data from NERV, ERDA developed a Positron Rifle that can shoot in a rapid fire. https://www.shinkalion.com/news/3268/ 
G-Type Unit

History

Development

Plarail Shinkalion CW 500 TYPE EVA Positron Form was made by TAKARA TOMY. It was released on 06 December 2025 for the asking price of ￥7,920 (Tax included). It includes the Shinkalion 500 TYPE EVA (CW), ERDA Positron Rifle and Shinkalion 500 TYPE EVA Positron Form. https://web.archive.org/web/20251018042429/https://www.takaratomy.co.jp/products/plarail/shinkalion/tettei/500typeeva/ 

It is compatible with TAKARA TOMY plastic rail "NERV Private Railway Shimonikoyama Branch Line　「Operation Yashima」　Diesel Locomotive DD51 & Shiki 880 (B2 Beam Equipped) Schnabel Car", with the Outdoor 275kV Ultra-High Voltage Normal Transformer that can be attached in the back of Shinkalion 500 TYPE EVA Positron Form.
